client_name: Green Harvest Farms Sp. z o.o.
purpose: Purchase of automated sorting and packaging line to increase processing capacity by 40%
collateral_description: The equipment itself (automated sorting line, Marel brand) + existing warehouse at Poznań Industrial Park
additional_notes: Seasonal revenue pattern (Q3-Q4 account for 60% of annual revenue). Long-term supply contracts with Biedronka and Lidl.
